backend/main.mo: Main ICP actor defining user profiles, game types (characters, items, marketplace), and CRUD operations with access control and blob storage mixins. Handles character creation, item management, and marketplace listings.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing implemented features with associated files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels, covering equipment stats, monster name generation, and attack speed tick exposure.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing their roles in the game's UI, engine, and data layers.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file importing Tailwind directives and defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the UI.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the Abyss Ascendant app, mounting the React app at the `#root` div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing authentication flow, profile setup, character creation, dungeon navigation, death handling, and rendering all game screens with shared state via hooks.
frontend/src/components/AbilitySelectMod: Full-screen modal for browsing, purchasing, and equipping up to 3 abilities from the ability pool, with archetype filtering and slot-replacement logic.
frontend/src/components/CharacterCreatio: React form component for creating a new character, allowing the user to set a name, realm (Softcore/Hardcore), and allocate 8 stat points across STR/DEX/INT/VIT before submitting to the backend via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/CharacterSheet.t: Displays a character's stats, derived combat values, XP progress, and equipped abilities, with controls to spend stat points and manage ability slots via a modal.
frontend/src/components/DungeonRunScreen: Runs and animates a full combat sequence against a dungeon monster, streaming log entries one by one, then reports the result (survival, XP, loot) to the parent and submits XP to the backend.
frontend/src/components/DungeonSelectScr: Screen for choosing a dungeon mode (Catacombs, Depths, Ascension Trial) with level requirements, XP progress display, and a modal for reviewing pending loot from the previous run.
Tabbed inventory UI showing the character's inventory, stash, and equipped items, with click-to-select item actions for equipping, unequipping, and moving items between inventory and stash.
frontend/src/components/ItemTooltip.tsx: Renders a styled tooltip card for a generated item, displaying its rarity, type, base stats (damage/defense), and affixes with icons and color-coded labels.
frontend/src/components/LeaderboardScree: Displays a mock seasonal leaderboard with Softcore and Hardcore tabs, showing player rankings by level and XP with status indicators.
frontend/src/components/LevelUpModal.tsx: Modal dialog that lets players allocate available stat points across Strength, Dexterity, Intelligence, and Vitality when leveling up.
frontend/src/components/LoginScreen.tsx: Landing/login screen that authenticates users via Internet Identity, displaying the game logo, feature highlights, and a login/logout button.
frontend/src/components/MarketplaceScree: Marketplace UI with browse and sell tabs, allowing players to list inventory items for ICP and purchase listings from other players.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky top navigation header showing character info, a logout button, and tab-based navigation links to all major game screens.
frontend/src/components/ProfessionsPlace: Renders a 'Coming Soon' placeholder page for the Professions feature, displaying four crafting categories (Smithing, Alchemy, Tinkering, Gathering) with icons and descriptions in a dungeon-themed layout.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that forces new users to set an adventurer username, with validation (length and character rules) before submitting via the `useSaveCallerUserProfile` mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/ShrinesPlacehold: Renders a 'Coming Soon' placeholder page for the Shrines of Power feature, showing four shrine types (Ember, Gold, Arcane, Storm) with animated icons and descriptions.
frontend/src/components/XPBar.tsx: Displays a character's XP progress bar toward the next level, supporting both compact (single-line) and full (multi-line with totals) display modes.
frontend/src/data/abilities.ts: Defines the `Ability` type and exports a static `ABILITIES` array containing combat abilities across four archetypes (melee, ranged, magic, tank) with stats like cooldown, damage multiplier, and stat scaling.
frontend/src/data/monsters.ts: Defines the `MonsterTemplate` interface, prefix/suffix pools for procedural name generation, and exports `MONSTER_TEMPLATES` — a list of 10 monster types with base stats, XP rewards, and attack timing.
frontend/src/engine/combatEngine.ts: Implements the core combat simulation engine, including stat derivation from character attributes and equipped items, player/monster attack tick calculations, and interfaces for combat results and log entries.
frontend/src/engine/lootGenerator.ts: Defines types and logic for procedurally generating game items with randomized rarity, affixes, base stats, names, and icons based on weighted pools and rarity tiers.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useLocalCharacter.ts: Custom hook that manages a local character's state (stats, inventory, abilities, XP, levels) with localStorage persistence and helper functions for progression and item management.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes React Query hooks for backend interactions including user profile, character creation, dungeon results, and marketplace listing/buying operations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining a dark fantasy design system with OKLCH CSS variables for colors, rarity tiers, glow effects, and custom utility classes using Tailwind.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/types/game.ts: Defines core frontend TypeScript types for the RPG game including screens, items, character state, combat, and constants like class tiers and XP-per-level tables.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with game-specific colors (ember, dungeon-gold, rarity tiers), custom fonts, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing the full-stack ICP-based hack-and-slash RPG's architecture, existing features, known issues, and versioning metadata.
